groups.title: Tour Booking Enquiry
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: Type of holiday: $1$ Hotel: • meal: including $2$ • facilities: a pool, a nightclub and a $3$ • prices: reduce from $4$ € to €315 Self-catering Apartment: stay in a $5$ room Equipment Rental: rental for one week: $6$ € Types of Insurance: • $7$ cover: €30 • premier cover: $8$ € Transport: the cheapest way of going to the airport: by $9$ Payment Method: pay by $10$ : no extra fee

questions.title: facilities: a pool, a nightclub and a 【   】
the cheapest way of going to the airport: by 【   】

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Good afternoon.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Good afternoon.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Atlanta Travel Agency, may I help you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I saw your advert in the newspaper this morning and decided to come over for more detailed information about some trips that you currently offer.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: What kind of trips do you have in mind?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Well, I enjoy surfing very much and want to get tanned, but all my friends suggest either mountain climbing or biking.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: We currently offer all the three types.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Even though biking is the most popular type of holiday, it doesn't work for everyone.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: I think you should follow your heart.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: What are my options for accommodation then?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: For this type of holiday, you can choose to stay in a hotel or a self-catering apartment.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Can you introduce the hotel package first?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Sure.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: The price for our hotel package is quite reasonable compared with that of your own reservation.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: What does the price include?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It covers the beachside hotel and free breakfast.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Good.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Does the hotel have any recreational facilities?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Oh, rest assured.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: The hotel is fully equipped with a pool, a nightclub and a gym.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Guests can enjoy a vibrant nightlife during their stay at the hotel.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Five-star ratings are common for the hotel's satisfying service.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: So how much does it cost?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Well, it was originally 360 euros for an adult, but we are now offering a Labour Day promotion.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: You can get a discount of 12.5%.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: So that's ... 315 euros for now, a really good deal.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: What about the self-catering apartment?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Oh, that'll be even cheaper.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But you have to stay in a shared room with other guests.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Each room has 6 bunk beds with lockers.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: OK ... I think the hotel is much better.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Getting a good night's sleep is critical for a relaxing holiday.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I can't stand sharing a room with someone who snores all night long.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Can't agree more.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: What about the surfing equipment rental?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I don't want to bring my own surfboard.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: You can hire a surfboard by the hour, day or week.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Just book it in advance, and it will be delivered to the hotel or even directly to the beach.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: How much does it cost?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It costs 15 euros for a day.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But for a week's rental, it's just 75 euros.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: The surf station also provides surf lessons if you're interested.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: That's good to know.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Oh, there's one more thing you should know.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Just in case of an accident during your trip, we recommend each customer to have the correct travel cover in place before leaving home.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Please tell me about it.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Well, we mainly offer two types of insurance.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: The first one is basic coverage.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It costs 30 euros.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: What does it include?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It covers medical treatment during your trip and things like missing your flight, flight delays and cancellations.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But you know extreme sports can be quite dangerous, and therefore injuries during these activities are excluded.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Then, how about the other one?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: The second one is called premier cover.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It is more expensive at 42.50 euros.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But we highly recommend this one for regular surfers.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: If you receive an injury or hurt anyone else while participating in extreme sports like surfing, you are fully covered.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I see.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I think I'll go with the premier cover.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: When your flight gets in, there will be a minivan to pick you up at the airport and take you to the hotel.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But you'll have to get to London airport yourself.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: It's alright.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I'll just take the airport shuttle.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Actually, I personally suggest you take a taxi.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Thanks for the tip.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I think I'll book a trip for next weekend.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: OK, how would you like to pay?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Do you accept credit cards?

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: Yes, we do.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: But there will be a slight charge on that.

transcript.speaker: Travel Agent
transcript.en: If you pay by cheque, there is no extra fee.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: Great.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.en: I'll write you a cheque then ...

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 holiday；提示词 Type，此处应填表示度假类型的名词。
题目解析：定位词 holiday 容易发生替换，注意抓取与类型相关的名词。听到工作人员问"What kind of trips ..."时就要集中注意力，随后听到 surfing、mountain climbing 和 biking 三种度假类型，但后两种是朋友的建议，属于干扰信息，surfing 才是顾客喜欢的类型。虽然后文中工作人员再次提及 biking，但随即进行了否定，并建议 follow your heart，顾客以 Right 回答表示认同。从做题技巧而言，如果空白处要求只填写一个单词，但录音中的词汇却以并列关系同时出现，往往可排除，因为无论从字数还是逻辑上都不符合要求。因此答案为 surfing。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Hotel、meal；提示词 meal，此处应填表示酒店包餐类型的名词。
题目解析：通过预判，本题变得比较简单，答案范围一般包括 breakfast、lunch 和 dinner 这类词汇，通过小标题的 Hotel 定位后，很容易抓取到答案词。因此答案为 breakfast。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pool、nightclub；提示词 facilities、a，此处应填表示设施的单数名词。
题目解析：在雅思听力中，常考的酒店设施有 spa、bar、gym 和 games room 等，平时要注意积累。本题较为简单，注意抓取与 pool、nightclub 并列的单数名词即可。因此答案为 gym。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 prices、€315；提示词 reduce from、€，此处应填数字，且为原价。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。录音中的 how much does it cost 对应 prices，提示答案信息即将出现，随后听到："Well, it was originally 360 euros ..."其中 originally 意为"原来"，符合题干要求，而后面出现的 315 euros 为降价后的价格（题干已给出），为干扰信息。在雅思听力中，数字填空题不需要计算，都是原词给出。因此答案为 360。注意区分 60 和 16 的发音。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Self-catering Apartment；提示词 a、room，此处应填形容词或名词。
题目解析：本题考查对住宿场景的认知，常考的房间类型有 single room、twin room 等，小标题 Self-catering Apartment 意为"自助公寓"，通常价格比较经济，但需要共用一些设施。该词不易发生替换，注意听工作人员之后的解释。题干较录音原文未发生改变，只需要抓取修饰 room 的词汇即可。因此答案为 shared。

6.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Equipment Rental、one week；提示词 €，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题考查对数字的反应速度以及对干扰信息的辨识。定位词 Equipment Rental 在录音中原词重现，随后工作人员介绍了租赁方式，接着顾客询问了价格，工作人员给出了 15 euros 和 75 euros 两个价格，前者是租一天的价格，而后者才是租一周的价格。因此答案为 75。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Insurance、€30；提示词 Types、cover，此处应填表示保险类型的形容词或名词。
题目解析：定位词 Insurance 在录音中原词重现，注意听与保险类型相关的信息。录音中提到有两种保险类型，第一种是 basic coverage，其中 coverage 替换了题干中的 cover，其前修饰词即为答案，随后出现的 30 euros 帮助我们进一步确定了答案。因此答案为 basic。

8.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 premier cover；提示词 €，此处应填数字。
题目解析：本题依然考查对数字的反应速度。定位词 premier cover 原词重现后，答案句随即出现："It is more expensive at 42.50 euros."因此答案为 42.50 或 42.5。注意带小数点的数字的读法。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 Transport、airport；提示词 by，此处应填表示交通工具的名词。
题目解析：录音中先后出现了三种交通工具，分别是 minivan、shuttle 和 taxi。注意题干的条件限定为 the cheapest 和 to the airport，minivan 是下飞机之后接顾客去旅馆（to the hotel）的工具，工作人员说顾客需要自己去机场（to London airport），顾客提出自己乘坐 shuttle 去机场，不过工作人员建议乘坐 taxi，并说："It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle."其中 much cheaper than other types of transport 替换了题干中的 the cheapest。因此答案为 taxi。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词 pay、no extra fee；提示词 pay by，此处应填表示支付方式的名词。
题目解析：在雅思听力中，常考的支付方式有 cash、credit card 和 cheque/check 这三大类，个别情况还考查过 online payment，平时多注意积累场景考点词有助于预判时缩小答案范围。本题先是听到顾客问是否能用 credit cards 支付，工作人员回答 Yes，紧接着的转折信号词 But 提示我们有附加情况，即会收取少量费用（a slight charge），不符合题干限定 no extra fee，可排除。然后工作人员给出了自己的建议，no extra fee 同时出现。因此答案为 cheque 或其美式拼写 check。
